div.head: 8. Editorial Note
div.p: On January 7–8, the Government of Israel announced a further troop withdrawal to a line roughly following the meridian 33 degrees 44 minutes, leaving no Israeli forces west of El Arish in the Sinai Peninsula. (Report by the Secretary-General on compliance with General Assembly resolutions calling for withdrawal of troops and other measures, January 15; U.N. doc. A/3500)
